mapper.select:
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , RCMD_ENPR_BZN , PRN_NM , CHRG_AUDOFIR , CNPL , EAD , RCMD_ENPR_NM , MAIN_BIZ , LEAD_INVSTR_PRN_NM , LEAD_INVSTR_AMOUNT , LEAD_INVSTR_STEP , INVM_RND_END_PNTTM , TOT_INVM_CNFMN_AMT , TOT_INVM_CNFMN_AMT_TO , PROGRS_VALUE , PROGRS_VALUE_TO , RECOMEND_OPINION , OPRTR_CNFA_YN , ATCHMNFL , SBMS_STTS , SPRN_FILD , RGSN_TS , RGSN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_RECOMENDCP_INFO_BASS_M WHERE 1=1
AND ( UPPER(PRN_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchContent}) || '%' )
AND UPPER(RCMD_ENPR_BZN) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchUser}) || '%'
AND OPRTR_CNFA_YN = #{searchStatus}
ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , RCMD_ENPR_BZN , PRN_NM , CHRG_AUDOFIR , CNPL , EAD , RCMD_ENPR_NM , MAIN_BIZ , LEAD_INVSTR_PRN_NM , LEAD_INVSTR_AMOUNT , LEAD_INVSTR_STEP , INVM_RND_END_PNTTM , TOT_INVM_CNFMN_AMT , TOT_INVM_CNFMN_AMT_TO , PROGRS_VALUE , PROGRS_VALUE_TO , RECOMEND_OPINION , OPRTR_CNFA_YN , ATCHMNFL , SBMS_STTS , SPRN_FILD , RGSN_TS , RGSN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_RECOMENDCP_INFO_BASS_M WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND RCMD_ENPR_BZN = #{rcmdEnprBzn}
